source.title: Human Developmental Cell Atlas (HDCA) v2 — pan-organ integrated single-cell reference
source.notes: Cell types extracted from refined_celltype column of HDCA v2 zarr (hdca_v2_20260311_f2.zarr). Co-annotations (broad_celltype, germlayer, systems, organ, development_stage) computed by cross-tabulating obs columns; values shown are dominant (collapsed when share>=0.95). development_stage uses HsapDv ontology IDs.
